prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年郑州大学在北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约13255名→11096名→12440名→11725名→12103名，整体呈波动走势，近3年在11700–12400区间内小幅震荡，2025年基准位次约12103名；该校在北京市综合类招生计划2021–2024年均为12人，2025年增至13人，2026年进一步扩招至16人，较2025年增加约23%。扩招通常使位次数字增大（更易进），但需结合其他因素综合判断。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 郑州大学为国家211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升，2021年第53名→2022年第51名→2023年第46名→2024年第50名→2025年第50名→2026年第44名，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和认可度增强；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，但事件以学校管理回应类中性舆情为主（13条中性、1条负面），负面程度有限；抖音热度总排名第8（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度较高；2025年投档异常文件显示该校在全国范围出现投档线溃败信号（高关注），黑龙江曾出现389分录取的极端案例，可能对2026年北京考生报考心理产生一定观望情绪。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年相关专业大类热度：计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业为高热推荐，临床医学为推荐，新闻传播为明显劝退。该校在北京招生专业涵盖临床医学、计算机科学与技术、自动化等热门方向，也有新闻传播学类等劝退专业，专业结构分化明显。北京市考生总数2025年约65434人，2026年增至约84900人（+29.7%），考生规模大幅扩大，竞争显著加剧；郑州大学位于河南省，在北京属于跨省招生。该校在北京招生规模较小（13–16人），属于外地高校在京少量招生，受地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次12103名、2026年扩招23%（推高位次数字增大）、北京考生总数大幅增长29.7%（推高位次数字增大）、软科排名持续上升及抖音高热（吸引更多关注，竞争加剧）等多重因素，扩招的宽松效应被考生激增的竞争压力所抵消，且学校热度上升进一步推高竞争。预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年有所后移，预测最低位次约13979名，区间13479–14479名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（河南）（省医临床学院）
- 计算机科学与技术（河南）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 自动化（河南）
- 经济学（河南）（双学士学位）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 新闻传播学类（河南）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间13479–14479名内，建议以二档专业（自动化、经济学）为主攻方向，一档专业（临床医学、计算机科学与技术）作为冲刺，三档专业（新闻传播学类）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限时可重点冲刺一档热门专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhengzhou University in Beijing's comprehensive category were approximately 13255 → 11096 → 12440 → 11725 → 12103, showing a fluctuating trend, with slight oscillations within the 11700–12400 range in the past three years, and a baseline ranking of about 12103 in 2025. The enrollment plan for comprehensive category in Beijing was 12 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 13 in 2025, and further expanded to 16 in 2026, an increase of about 23% compared to 2025. Expansion usually increases the ranking number (easier to enter), but other factors need to be considered comprehensively.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhengzhou University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising: 53rd in 2021 → 51st in 2022 → 46th in 2023 → 50th in 2024 → 50th in 2025 → 44th in 2026, indicating continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, but the incidents are mainly neutral public opinion regarding school management responses (13 neutral, 1 negative), with limited negative impact. Douyin popularity ranks 8th overall (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, leading to high application attention. The 2025 filing anomaly file shows signs of a collapse in admission lines nationwide (high attention), with an extreme case of 389 points admission in Heilongjiang, which may cause some wait-and-see sentiment among Beijing applicants in 2026.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, major categories' popularity: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc., are highly recommended engineering majors; Clinical Medicine is recommended; Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. The university's enrollment in Beijing includes popular directions such as Clinical Medicine, Computer Science and Technology, Automation, as well as discouraged majors like Journalism and Communication, showing clear structural differentiation. The total number of Beijing applicants was about 65434 in 2025, increasing to about 84900 in 2026 (+29.7%), significantly expanding competition. Zhengzhou University is located in Henan Province, enrolling across provinces in Beijing. Its enrollment scale in Beijing is small (13–16 students), making it a small-scale enrollment from an out-of-town university, with limited regional preference influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 12103, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 23% (pushing the ranking number higher), the significant 29.7% increase in Beijing applicant numbers (pushing the ranking number higher), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking and high Douyin popularity (attracting more attention and intensifying competition), the easing effect of expansion is offset by the competitive pressure from the surge in applicants, and the increased school popularity further heightens competition. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be lower than in 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 13979, ranging from 13479 to 14479.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Henan) (Provincial Medical Clinical College)
- Computer Science and Technology (Henan).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Journalism and Communication (Henan).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 13479–14479, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Automation, Economics) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine, Computer Science and Technology) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Journalism and Communication) as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors.
